case_title: Complaint showing partial engagement with intermittent delays
decision_trigger: Institution responded at key points but with gaps, delays, and partial clarity.
recall_question: Does partial engagement indicate progress or controlled procedural pacing?
desired_outcome: Determine whether continued engagement is productive or whether escalation should be prepared.

actors.name: Citizen complainant
actors.incentive_or_pressure: seek clarity while avoiding premature escalation
actors.likely_behaviour: continue engagement while tracking response quality

actors.name: Public Body Complaints Unit
actors.incentive_or_pressure: maintain procedural flow while managing exposure

actors.name: Internal Review Office
actors.role_in_case: review complaint aspects when escalated internally
actors.likely_behaviour: engage selectively and delay full resolution

evidence_bundle.label: Partial response
evidence_bundle.relevance: Addresses some elements but leaves key questions open

deadlines.label: Expected clarification response
deadlines.consequence: If response remains partial or delayed, escalation becomes more viable

timeline.label: Partial response issued
timeline.description: Institution responded but did not address all points.

timeline.label: Additional response issued
timeline.description: Further response provided but still incomplete.

escalation_paths.name: Continue internal engagement
escalation_paths.trigger: Institution continues to respond, albeit partially

escalation_paths.name: Prepare external escalation
escalation_paths.trigger: Repeated partial responses without full resolution
escalation_paths.likely_response: Review based on documented gaps and response quality

linked_cases.note: More engagement than case 002 but less clarity than case 001.
Shares delay characteristics but retains some engagement.

structural_insight: The institution engages intermittently, providing partial responses that maintain process continuity without fully resolving issues.
personal_positioning: The complainant remains engaged while carefully monitoring response quality and completeness.
decision_note: Continue engagement but monitor for repeated partial responses that may justify escalation.
learning_capture: Partial engagement can create the appearance of progress while delaying full resolution, requiring careful monitoring of response quality.
